name: Michael Jimerson

contactInfo.office: 115 N. Main St., Suite 300, Henderson, TX 75652

bio: Michael Jimerson serves as the District Attorney for Rusk County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Henderson area. He is committed to upholding justice and ensuring the safety of Rusk County communities.
campaignPromises: Combat the drug epidemic in Rusk County
Advocate for victims' rights in the criminal justice system
Maintain an efficient and transparent DA's office
Partner with law enforcement to protect the community
